creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Tim Daneliuk wrote:

Please submit an pciconf -vl and where possible an dmesg -v, and kldstat
-v (I think you either need to load the module or build the support in
your kernel if you have an drm card to load with agp, from what I know
this is not being done automatically).

Please reply-all when you have this information, mostly it works best if
you paste the information in your email (attachements gets filtered out
every now and then).

Thanks for using FreeBSD and for the information in advance!

Cheers
remko
